info.title: XShipReport Action Group
info.description:
Run XShip institution / fee / waiver report use cases. The agent calls POST /run with { useCase, params }; the Lambda maps each use case to its backend REST endpoint:
- xShipInstitution: GET /xshipreport/view/XShipInstitution/{rollupAbaName}/{period}
- xShipWaiver: GET /xshipreport/view/XShipWaiver/{rollupAbaName}/{period}
- xShipFeeDetail: GET /xshipreport/view/XShipFeeDetail/{rollupAbaName}/{zone}/{period}/{startDt}/{endDt}/{denomType}  (export: /{formatType}/{reportName}/{rollupAbaName}/{zone}/{period}/{startDt}/{endDt}/{denomType}/{aba})
- xShipFeeSummary: GET /xshipreport/view/XShipFeeSummary/{rollupAbaName}/{zone}/{period}/{denomType}  (export: /{formatType}/{reportName}/{rollupAbaName}/{zone}/{period}/{denomType}/{aba})
- xShipFee: GET /xshipreport/view/XShipFee/{rollupAbaName}/{period}  (export: /{formatType}/{reportName}/{rollupAbaName}/{period}/{aba})
- currentQuarter: GET /xshipreport/view/currentQuarter

post.summary: Execute an XShipReport use case and return its rows + metadata.
post.description: Runs one XShipReport use case. Provide the params required by the chosen use case's endpoint; supply formatType/reportName/aba to request an export artifact for the fee use cases.

useCase.description: The XShipReport use case to execute.

params.description: Extracted parameters. Which are required depends on the use case (see the operation description for the endpoint mapping).

zone.description: Activity zone code (fee detail/summary path segment).

startDt.description: Range start date, ISO yyyy-MM-dd (fee detail path segment).

endDt.description: Range end date, ISO yyyy-MM-dd (fee detail path segment).

formatType.description: Export format type, e.g. csv/pdf (export path segment).

reportName.description: Report name for the export artifact (export path segment).

aba.description: Target ABA appended on the export path.

200.description: Dispatch result for the XShipReport use case.
